N.description: Quantity of different types of resources

Y.description: The quantity of resource j that is accessible.

A.description: The quantity of electrical energy generated from trial i

I.description: Resource j quantity needed for experiment i.

j.description: The frequency at which each experiment is performed.

constraints.description: The amount of metal needed for all experiments does not surpass the metal that is currently available.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstr(quicksum(I[0][i] * j[i] for i in range(M)) <= Y[0])

constraints.description: The sum of acid needed for all experiments does not surpass the amount of acid that is available.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstr(quicksum(I['acid'][i] * j[i] for i in range(M)) <= Y['acid'])

objective.description: Increase the overall electrical output by conducting the experiments to their full potential.

code.gurobipy: model.setObjective(quicksum(j[i] * A[i] for i in range(M)), GRB.MAXIMIZE)
